Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses For Request For Admission
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KHUSHBOO B. VASANDANI, Esq. of B & D Law Group, APLC (Tel: 310-424-5252) for plaintiff Jonathan Valladares;
Atty. DAVID P. ARMANINI, Esq. of Norton & Melnik, APC (Tel: 925-718-1040) for defendant/cross-complainant Amar Enterprises, Inc. dba Skylark Limousine.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JONATHAN VALLADARES' Motion To Compel Further Responses For Request For Admission.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulate form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Jonathan Valladares' ("Valladares'") Motion to Compel Further Responses for Request for Admission is DENIED. Prevailing party, Defendant and Cross-Complainant Amar Enterprises, Inc.'s dba Skylark Limousine ("Skylark's") request for sanctions in the amount of $1925 GRANTED. All other sanctions, if any, are DENIED.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Prevailing party, Skylark shall prepare a form of the order recapitulating the Court's ruling, timely comply with Cal. R. Ct. 3.1312, and submit the proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at drobbins@tongrobbins.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
